title: DDOG Q1 Deep Dive: AI Adoption and Product Expansion Drive Strong Growth
text: DDOG Q1 2026 Deep Dive Analysis. AI Adoption Momentum: Datadog's Q1 2026 results highlight the significant impact of AI adoption on the company's growth trajectory. Over 6,500 customers are now using Datadog's AI integrations representing 20 percent of the customer base but generating 80 percent of total ARR. Product Expansion: The company continues to expand its product portfolio with new offerings including GPU monitoring for AI workloads and expanded security capabilities through Bits AI Security Analyst. Customer Growth: Datadog achieved approximately 33,200 total customers with 4,550 at the 100,000 plus ARR level. Platform depth improved with 56 percent of customers using four or more products. Revenue Acceleration: Revenue reached 1.01 billion up 32 percent year-over-year marking acceleration from prior quarters. Large Deals: Management highlighted multiple seven and eight-figure deals with major AI research teams. Guidance Confidence: The company raised guidance to 4.3-4.34 billion for full-year 2026 reflecting confidence in sustained growth.
